scientific_scope: Disclosed two-product researcher extension motivated by the thesis statement that the real MFSC produces 21 ration types while the executable DES models one homogeneous ration.
claim_limit: Any positive result is conditional on the stated synthetic product, setup, substitution and signal physics. It is not a numerical claim about the real MFSC product portfolio and is not learned or neural value.

stages.A: Workbook-based affected-order metric ceiling; no stochastic tape and no policy comparison.
stages.B: Corrected two-product exact transducer with complete full-horizon open-loop enumeration; prohibited until Stage A clears.
stages.C: Isolated full-DES product-tagged implementation; prohibited until Stage B clears.
stages.D: Observable belief/MPC comparison; prohibited until full-DES H_PI validation clears.
stages.E: Learner; prohibited until all pre-learner gates clear.

researcher_introduced_physics.action: At each weekly epoch choose k in {0,1,2,3}, the number of the next three 5000-ration batches committed to P_C; 3-k are committed to P_H.
researcher_introduced_physics.commitment: Weekly batch targets are immutable after action and activate after 24 hours.
researcher_introduced_physics.within_week_sequence: Frozen minimum-changeover sequence shared by every policy; not a policy right.

resource_vector: productive plus setup plus unavailable line hours
mandatory_comparators: exact finite-horizon belief DP where tractable
mandatory_guardrails: lost orders overall and by requested product

null_cell.required_result: Relabeling every batch is transition- and metric-identical; H_PI=H_obs=0 exactly.

stage_a.inputs: The three already-open Garrido Excel workbooks used by the v2 implementation audit.
stage_a.method: For each visible workbook row use the canonical v2 ReT value. Because a row cannot improve beyond ReT=1, sort deficits (1-ReT) and compute the smallest number and fraction of perfectly rescued rows needed to move the sheet mean by 0.01.
stage_a.interpretation: This is a metric-liveness necessary-condition check only. It is not H_PI, H_obs, a product-physics result or authorization to simulate.
stage_a.pass_rule: At least one workbook permits a 0.01 improvement by perfectly rescuing no more than 10 percent of visible rows.
stage_a.failure_rule: If every workbook requires more than 10 percent of visible rows, stop Program O before the transducer.
